items.title_original: Claude Sonnet 5 costs $2 per 1M input tokens and $10 per 1M output tokens through August 31, after which prices rise to $3 and $15, respectively (Zac Hall/9to5Mac)
items.title_en: Claude Sonnet 5 costs $2 per 1M input tokens and $10 per 1M output tokens through August 31, after which prices rise to $3 and $15, respectively (Zac Hall/9to5Mac)
items.title_zh: 截至 8 月 31 日，Claude Sonnet 5 每 100 万个输入代币的成本为 2 美元，每 100 万个输出代币的成本为 10 美元，此后价格分别升至 3 美元和 15 美元（Zac Hall/9to5Mac）
items.title_bilingual: 截至 8 月 31 日，Claude Sonnet 5 每 100 万个输入代币的成本为 2 美元，每 100 万个输出代币的成本为 10 美元，此后价格分别升至 3 美元和 15 美元（Zac Hall/9to5Mac） / Claude Sonnet 5 costs $2 per 1M input tokens and $10 per 1M output tokens through August 31, after which prices rise to $3 and $15, respectively (Zac Hall/9to5Mac)

items.title: A study of 22K US companies shows those spending most heavily on AI are adding workers faster than peers, but most gains are among tech companies and startups (Financial Times)
items.title_original: A study of 22K US companies shows those spending most heavily on AI are adding workers faster than peers, but most gains are among tech companies and startups (Financial Times)
items.title_en: A study of 22K US companies shows those spending most heavily on AI are adding workers faster than peers, but most gains are among tech companies and startups (Financial Times)
items.title_zh: 对 22000 家美国公司的一项研究表明，那些在人工智能上投入最多的公司增加员工的速度比同行更快，但大部分收益来自科技公司和初创公司（《金融时报》）
items.title_bilingual: 对 22000 家美国公司的一项研究表明，那些在人工智能上投入最多的公司增加员工的速度比同行更快，但大部分收益来自科技公司和初创公司（《金融时报》） / A study of 22K US companies shows those spending most heavily on AI are adding workers faster than peers, but most gains are among tech companies and startups (Financial Times)

items.title: AI and vibe coding fuel a surge in game releases; ATTN Economy says 181K mobile games launched in six months to May, up 118% on iOS and 73% on Android YoY (Orlando Crowcroft/Financial Times)
items.title_original: AI and vibe coding fuel a surge in game releases; ATTN Economy says 181K mobile games launched in six months to May, up 118% on iOS and 73% on Android YoY (Orlando Crowcroft/Financial Times)
items.title_en: AI and vibe coding fuel a surge in game releases; ATTN Economy says 181K mobile games launched in six months to May, up 118% on iOS and 73% on Android YoY (Orlando Crowcroft/Financial Times)
items.title_zh: 人工智能和氛围编码推动了游戏发行量的激增； ATTN Economy 称截至 5 月的六个月内推出了 18.1 万款手机游戏，iOS 平台同比增长 118%，Android 平台同比增长 73%（Orlando Crowcroft/金融时报）
items.title_bilingual: 人工智能和氛围编码推动了游戏发行量的激增； ATTN Economy 称截至 5 月的六个月内推出了 18.1 万款手机游戏，iOS 平台同比增长 118%，Android 平台同比增长 73%（Orlando Crowcroft/金融时报） / AI and vibe coding fuel a surge in game releases; ATTN Economy says 181K mobile games launched in six months to May, up 118% on iOS and 73% on Android YoY (Orlando Crowcroft/Financial Times)

items.title: TIL CPU manufacturers don’t intentionally make low-end or high-end chips. Every chip (of the same design) is manufactured the same, then tested and classified into different performance tiers based on how well it performs.
items.title_original: TIL CPU manufacturers don’t intentionally make low-end or high-end chips. Every chip (of the same design) is manufactured the same, then tested and classified into different performance tiers based on how well it performs.
items.title_en: TIL CPU manufacturers don’t intentionally make low-end or high-end chips. Every chip (of the same design) is manufactured the same, then tested and classified into different performance tiers based on how well it performs.
items.title_zh: TIL CPU制造商并不刻意生产低端或高端芯片。每个芯片（相同设计）的制造都是相同的，然后进行测试并根据其性能分为不同的性能等级。
items.title_bilingual: TIL CPU制造商并不刻意生产低端或高端芯片。每个芯片（相同设计）的制造都是相同的，然后进行测试并根据其性能分为不同的性能等级。 / TIL CPU manufacturers don’t intentionally make low-end or high-end chips. Every chip (of the same design) is manufactured the same, then tested and classified into different performance tiers based on how well it performs.
